# BasaltCRM API

> BasaltCRM is an enterprise CRM platform with a REST API for ecommerce integrations, customer tracking, bidirectional messaging, and headless CRM access.

## Authentication

All `/api/v1/*` endpoints require a Bearer token:

```
Authorization: Bearer sk_live_your_api_key_here
```

Generate keys from the Admin panel under API & Webhooks. Keys use bcrypt hashing and are only shown once at creation.

## Base URL

```
https://your-crm-domain.com
```

## Response Envelope

Success:
```json
{ "data": { ... }, "meta": { "total": 42, "page": 1, "pageSize": 25, "hasMore": true } }
```

Error:
```json
{ "error": { "code": "NOT_FOUND", "message": "Resource not found" } }
```

## Pagination

All list endpoints accept `?page=1&pageSize=25` (max 100).

---

## Contacts

Manage individual people (customers). Supports email-based upsert deduplication — safe to call on every ecommerce purchase.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/v1/contacts | List contacts. Query: `page`, `pageSize`, `email`, `status`, `type`, `search` |
| POST | /api/v1/contacts | Create or upsert contact. Deduplicates by `email`. Required: `last_name` |
| GET | /api/v1/contacts/{contactId} | Get single contact |
| PUT | /api/v1/contacts/{contactId} | Partial update contact |
| DELETE | /api/v1/contacts/{contactId} | Soft-delete (sets status inactive) |

### POST /api/v1/contacts — Example Body
```json
{
  "first_name": "Jane",
  "last_name": "Doe",
  "email": "jane@shop.com",
  "mobile_phone": "+1234567890",
  "tags": ["vip", "ecommerce"]
}
```

---

## Leads

Manage prospective customers. Email-based upsert deduplication.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/v1/leads | List leads. Query: `status`, `email`, `company`, `pipeline_stage`, `search` |
| POST | /api/v1/leads | Create or upsert lead. Deduplicates by `email`. Required: `lastName` |
| GET | /api/v1/leads/{leadId} | Get single lead |
| PUT | /api/v1/leads/{leadId} | Update lead |
| DELETE | /api/v1/leads/{leadId} | Soft-delete (archives) |

### POST /api/v1/leads — Example Body
```json
{
  "firstName": "John",
  "lastName": "Smith",
  "email": "john@acme.com",
  "company": "Acme Corp",
  "lead_source": "Website"
}
```

---

## Accounts

Company/organization profiles. Name-based upsert deduplication.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/v1/accounts | List accounts. Query: `name`, `status`, `search` |
| POST | /api/v1/accounts | Create or upsert account. Deduplicates by `name`. Required: `name` |
| GET | /api/v1/accounts/{accountId} | Get account with linked contacts and leads |
| PUT | /api/v1/accounts/{accountId} | Update account |
| DELETE | /api/v1/accounts/{accountId} | Soft-delete |

### POST /api/v1/accounts — Example Body
```json
{
  "name": "Acme Corp",
  "email": "info@acme.com",
  "type": "Customer",
  "website": "https://acme.com"
}
```

---

## Messages (Bidirectional)

Send outbound messages and receive inbound customer replies. Supports conversation threading via `conversation_id`.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/v1/messages | List messages. Query: `contactId`, `leadId`, `direction` (INBOUND/OUTBOUND), `channel`, `conversation_id` |
| POST | /api/v1/messages | Send outbound message. Auto-delivers email when `channel: "email"` |
| POST | /api/v1/messages/inbound | Webhook: push customer replies into CRM. Auto-creates contacts for unknown emails |
| GET | /api/v1/messages/{messageId} | Get message with full thread context |
| GET | /api/v1/messages/threads/{threadId} | Get complete conversation thread |

### POST /api/v1/messages — Send Outbound
```json
{
  "to": { "email": "jane@shop.com" },
  "subject": "Order Update",
  "body": "Your order has shipped!",
  "channel": "email"
}
```
`to` accepts: `{ contactId }`, `{ leadId }`, or `{ email }` (auto-resolves to contact/lead).

### POST /api/v1/messages/inbound — Receive Webhook
```json
{
  "email": "customer@shop.com",
  "body": "Where is my order?",
  "subject": "Order Question",
  "conversation_id": "conv_456",
  "metadata": { "orderId": "ORD-789" }
}
```
Unknown emails auto-create a contact tagged `["auto-created", "inbound-api"]`.

---

## Opportunities

Deal pipeline and revenue tracking.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/v1/opportunities | List opportunities. Query: `search`, `sales_stage` |
| POST | /api/v1/opportunities | Create opportunity. Required: `name` |
| GET | /api/v1/opportunities/{opportunityId} | Get single opportunity |
| PUT | /api/v1/opportunities/{opportunityId} | Update opportunity |

### POST /api/v1/opportunities — Example Body
```json
{
  "name": "Enterprise Deal",
  "budget": 50000,
  "sales_stage": "Negotiation",
  "close_date": "2026-06-30"
}
```

---

## Tasks

Task management and assignment.

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | /api/v1/tasks | List tasks. Query: `status` |
| POST | /api/v1/tasks | Create task. Required: `title` |
| GET | /api/v1/tasks/{taskId} | Get single task |
| PUT | /api/v1/tasks/{taskId} | Update task |

### POST /api/v1/tasks — Example Body
```json
{
  "title": "Follow up with Jane",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "status": "TODO",
  "due_date": "2026-04-01"
}
```

---

## Error Codes

| Status | Code | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| 401 | UNAUTHORIZED | Missing or invalid API key |
| 400 | VALIDATION_ERROR | Invalid request body or missing required fields |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | Resource not found or doesn't belong to your tenant |
| 500 | INTERNAL_ERROR | Unexpected server error |

---

## Ecommerce Integration Quickstart

1. Generate an API key from Admin → API & Webhooks
2. Store in `.env`: `CRM_API_KEY=sk_live_...`
3. On customer signup/purchase: `POST /api/v1/contacts` with email (upserts automatically)
4. Send order updates: `POST /api/v1/messages` with `channel: "email"`
5. Receive replies: POST to `/api/v1/messages/inbound` from your email/chat system
6. View conversations in CRM under the contact/lead timeline

## Optional Links

- [API Reference (Interactive)](https://your-crm-domain.com/developers/api-reference)
- [Authentication Guide](https://your-crm-domain.com/developers/authentication)
- [Webhooks](https://your-crm-domain.com/developers/webhooks)
